title: oncidium gloriosum var. flaviflorum
intro: Oncidium gloriosum var. flaviflorum, also known as the yellow-flowered Oncidium, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Oncidiinae subtribe. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oncidium gloriosum var. flaviflorum are thought to include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Oncidium gloriosum var. flaviflorum have been made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
